location: Lying on the ground just before the boss fog wall inside Academy Crystal Cave, beneath Raya Lucaria Academy in Liurnia of the Lakes. Also a 4% drop from Battlemage enemies, with extra static pickups in the graveyard in front of Sellia Hideaway (Caelid), outside West Windmill Pasture (Altus Plateau), and twice in Miquella's Haligtree.

source.name: Ground item before the Crystalian boss fog wall, Academy Crystal Cave

tactics: Strike damage (which the Stone Club deals) ignores the Crystalian boss's rock armor at the end of this dungeon — picking it up right before that fight is a natural fit.
The cave entrance needs two Stonesword Keys to open its fog gate; it's on the western cliff below Raya Lucaria Academy.
If you'd rather farm instead, the Battlemage outside West Windmill Pasture on Altus Plateau is an easy standalone target rather than hunting the drop.
lore: The trademark weapon of Raya Lucaria's battlemages — a lump of glintstone that's heavier than it looks and carries no magic of its own, kept around for when a sorcerer needs to settle things up close instead.

builds.name: Pure Strength Heavy Hitter
builds.why: C-scaling Strength with minimal Dexterity means nearly all upgrade points funnel into raw attack power for a Strength-focused build.
